The income listed is an approximation that represents 1/9th of the total income earned on all my direct book sales. I am unable to provide the exact amount of income I received from each book during the reporting period because I do not track the number of each book sold at each event, the price for which they were sold (pricing varies per event and books are sold individually and in sets). I have not received any royalties for this book.
